projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Explore my portfolio of web development projects, from professional client websites to technical challenges and applications. Each project demonstrates different skills and technologies.
projects.example_description: Demo: A performant SPA built with Vue and Tailwind.
projects.placeholder_description: Short description of the project using modern web stack.
projects.contactCTA: Contact me for a similar project
projects.emptyTab: Projects coming soon — check back later.

minata-portfolio.title: From MY Window - Minata Sartori
minata-portfolio.description: Professional portfolio website for photographer and filmmaker Minata Sartori. Multi-page site featuring photography galleries, video projects, and radio work. Fully responsive with interactive media players.
minata-portfolio.clientContext: Photographer and filmmaker needing a multi-page portfolio to present her photo and video work professionally.
minata-portfolio.result: Responsive multi-page portfolio with interactive media players — showcases photography, film, and radio productions.

trixie-conciergerie.title: Trixie Conciergerie
trixie-conciergerie.description: Luxury concierge services website for Saint-Tropez. Features booking system, service management, cleaning, gardening, and property maintenance. Modern responsive design with SEO optimization.
trixie-conciergerie.clientContext: Luxury concierge service in Saint-Tropez needing an upscale website to attract high-end clientele and manage service bookings.
trixie-conciergerie.result: Modern responsive site with booking system and SEO optimization — online presence matching the premium positioning.

miss-boat.title: Miss Boat
miss-boat.description: Boat rental website for Cavalaire-sur-Mer (French Riviera). License-free boat rentals for ages 16+. Built with Vue.js, Vue Router, and Tailwind CSS. Features pricing page, gallery, contact information, and responsive design.
miss-boat.clientContext: Boat rental company in Cavalaire-sur-Mer offering license-free rentals for ages 16+, seeking an online showcase with pricing.
miss-boat.result: Vue.js site with Tailwind CSS, pricing page, and gallery — currently in progress, delivery expected soon.

elsa-psychologue.title: Elsa Psychologue
elsa-psychologue.description: Professional website for psychologist Elsa. Clean and calming design with appointment booking, therapy information, and contact details. Built with modern web technologies and Firebase hosting.
elsa-psychologue.clientContext: Psychologist in solo practice looking for a professional, reassuring website to gain patient trust online.
elsa-psychologue.result: Clean and calming site deployed on Firebase — online appointment booking and clear therapy service presentation.

les-planches.title: Les Planches
les-planches.description: Mediterranean restaurant website in Cavalaire-sur-Mer. Features animated image galleries for menu and drinks, smooth scroll effects, and responsive design. Modern tapas and wine bar near Saint-Tropez.
les-planches.clientContext: Mediterranean tapas restaurant in Cavalaire-sur-Mer seeking an online presence to attract tourists near Saint-Tropez.
les-planches.result: Delivered in 3 weeks with animated gallery and smooth scrolling — operational for the season opening.

le-nain-vert.title: Le Nain Vert
le-nain-vert.description: Psychedelic streetwear e-commerce platform with real-time inventory, secure payment gateway, and role-based admin dashboard.
le-nain-vert.clientContext: Streetwear brand with a bold identity seeking a full e-commerce platform with inventory management and admin control.
le-nain-vert.result: Full-stack Vue.js + Firebase platform with real-time inventory, secure payment, and role-based admin dashboard — currently in progress.

re-fresh-earth.title: Re-Fresh Earth
re-fresh-earth.description: Environmental platform fighting urban heat islands using AI and satellite data. NASA Space Apps Challenge project featuring predictive machine learning, real-time thermal mapping with Landsat/Sentinel-2/MODIS, and intuitive dashboard for urban planners. Case study: Málaga.

get-next-line.title: get_next_line
get-next-line.description: Function that reads a line from a file descriptor. A challenging project that handles buffer management and memory allocation.

ft-printf.title: ft_printf
ft-printf.description: Custom implementation of the printf function in C. Handles multiple format specifiers and conversions.

libft.title: Libft
libft.description: Custom C library with reimplemented standard functions. Foundation library for all future C projects.

personal-libft.title: Personal Libft
personal-libft.description: Extended version of the standard C library with additional utility functions. Enhanced libft with custom implementations for advanced string manipulation, memory management, and data structures.

push-swap.title: push_swap
push-swap.description: Sorting algorithm project that sorts data on a stack with a limited set of instructions. Implements efficient algorithms to sort integers using two stacks and specific operations.

so-long.title: so_long
so-long.description: 2D game project built with MiniLibX. Create a small game where a character collects items and finds an exit. Focuses on graphics programming, event handling, and game logic.

random-rgb.title: Random RGB
random-rgb.description: A generator of rgb color, see the color, and copy the rgb

form-with-regex.title: Form with Regex
form-with-regex.description: A form with regex for all the inputs.

random-password.title: Random Password
random-password.description: Here is a generator of random password, you can add how many letters, maj/min, numbers or special caracteres.

philosophers.title: Philosophers
philosophers.description: Dining philosophers concurrency project implemented in C using pthreads and mutexes. Simulation of N philosophers avoiding deadlock and starvation.

minishell.title: Minishell
minishell.description: A minimal shell implementation in C supporting parsing, execution, redirections, and builtins. Educational project following strict coding rules.

series-tracker.title: Series Tracker
series-tracker.description: TV series tracking application for managing your watchlist. Keep track of episodes, seasons, and your viewing progress with an intuitive interface.

enchere.title: Enchere (Auction Site)
enchere.description: Online auction platform developed during ENI training. Features user authentication, bidding system, and real-time auction management with Java backend.

portfolio-v034.title: Portfolio v0.3.4
portfolio-v034.description: Previous version of this portfolio website. The older iteration of my personal portfolio showcasing my evolution as a developer.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm Melchior JORDA, a Full-Stack Developer passionate about systems programming (C/C++) and web development (Vue.js, PHP, Symfony). With strong foundations in algorithms, multithreading, and application design acquired at École 42, I combine technical expertise with hands-on experience in web development and quality assurance testing.

game_tester.title: LQA Tester at Localsoft
game_tester.description: Linguistic Quality Assurance testing on 15+ localization projects: translation errors, cultural inconsistencies, and display issues. Collaboration with international teams and team coordination (5-6 members).

web_dev.title: Full-Stack Developer – NainVert
web_dev.description: Design and full-stack development of a psychedelic streetwear e-commerce platform with Vue.js and Firebase: real-time inventory, secure payment gateway, role-based authentication, and admin dashboard.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Vue.js, Angular, JavaScript (ES6+, async/await), TypeScript, HTML5/CSS3, Bootstrap, RESTful APIs

backend.title: Backend & Systems
backend.description: C, C++ (STL, templates, OOP), PHP, Symfony (Doctrine, Twig, Security), Node.js, POSIX Threads, Mutex synchronization, Unix system calls

tools.title: Tools & Databases
tools.description: Git/GitHub, Docker, AWS basics, Valgrind, GDB, Firebase, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Firestore (NoSQL)

school42.title: École 42 Málaga — Software Engineering (Circle 4)
school42.description: Intensive peer-to-peer curriculum: C/C++ systems, algorithms, Unix, 3D graphics, concurrent and network programming. Projects: Minishell, Philosophers, cub3D, C++ Modules.

eni.title: ENI School — Web & Mobile Developer Degree (2023-2024)
eni.description: PHP/Symfony, Angular, Java, MySQL, HTML/CSS. Projects: event management and full-stack auction platform.

resume.title: Resume

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Full-stack developer passionate about systems programming (C/C++) and web development (Vue.js, PHP, Symfony). Strong foundations in algorithms, multithreading, and application design acquired at École 42. Seeking software development opportunities.

lqa_tester.title: LQA Tester – Localsoft, Málaga
lqa_tester.description: LQA testing on 15+ localization projects: translation errors, cultural inconsistencies, and display issues. Collaboration with international teams to ensure quality standards. Team coordination (5-6 members) during managerial absences.

nainvert.title: Full-Stack Developer – NainVert (E-Commerce)
nainvert.description: Design and full-stack development with Vue.js and Firebase: real-time inventory management, secure payment gateway, role-based authentication, and complete admin dashboard. Performance optimization via lazy loading and Firestore queries.

internship.title: Web Developer Intern – ENI School
internship.description: Development of a quiz application and event management website (Node.js, Electron.js, jQuery, MySQL). End-to-end autonomous project management, collaboration via Bitbucket and Trello using agile methodology.

minishell.title: Minishell – Unix Shell Implementation
minishell.description: Functional Unix shell in C: command parsing, pipes, redirections, process management (fork/exec), and signals (SIGINT, SIGQUIT).

philosophers.title: Philosophers – Concurrent Programming
philosophers.description: Dining philosophers problem with POSIX threads, mutexes, and semaphores: deadlock prevention and race condition management.

cub3d.title: cub3D – 3D Raycasting Engine
cub3d.description: 3D rendering engine in C (Wolfenstein-style): texture mapping, collision detection, mathematical transformations (~4000 lines).

cpp_modules.title: C++ OOP Modules (CPP00-04)
cpp_modules.description: Mastery of C++ fundamentals: inheritance, polymorphism, templates, STL, exception handling, and design patterns.

nasa.title: 1st Prize – NASA Space Apps Challenge Málaga 2025
nasa.description: 1st place with 'Re-Fresh Earth': smart urban planning tool using NASA satellite data to monitor natural resources and infrastructure. Live: re-fresh.earth

hobbies.description: Passionate about beach volleyball, travel (Asia, Oceania, Europe), and video games, especially management games and development with Unreal Engine.
